free_text: Experimental study of 26Al through the 1n pick-up
reaction 27Al(d,t)
Self supporting 27Al target of thickness ~ 90 ug/cm2.
Single-sided 55 um thick Si (delta E)
strip detector (16 vertical strips of 3 mm width) and
a double-sided 1030 um thick Si (E) strip detector 16
strips, width 3 mm, both sides mutually orthogonal to
each other.
The Silicon detectors were backed by four
CsI(Tl) detectors, each of thickness 6 cm. A
horizontal slit of width 6 mm was placed in front of
the telescope. The solid angle subtended by each
strip was 0.47 msr.
No information on source of uncertainties
except that the error in cross section data was taken
to be the total error including systematic as well as
statistical errors. The systematic error included the
uncertainties in the target thickness measurement,
the Faraday cup reading and the solid angle
measurement.
In measuring excitation energies, energy loss
corrections due to the target thickness and the dead
layers in Si detectors were taken into consideration.
A.Sharma+BL
VT. Revision in 003
Fig.5 of Phys. Rev. C,91(2015)054611
VT. REACTION SF3: INL->T, SF4: AL-27->AL-26
